sentences.arabic: رَأَى وَلِيدٌ ظِلًّا كَبِيرًا عَلَى الْجِدَارِ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Walid je noću vidio veliku sjenu na zidu.
sentences.translationEn: Walid saw a large shadow on the wall at night.

sentences.translation: Malo se uplašio i pozvao oca.
sentences.translationEn: He was a little scared and called his father.

sentences.translation: Otac je došao i pogledao sjenu.
sentences.translationEn: The father came and looked at the shadow.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: هَذَا ظِلُّ الشَّجَرَةِ أَمَامَ الْمَصْبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: To je sjena drveta ispred lampe.
sentences.translationEn: He said: This is the shadow of the tree in front of the lamp.

sentences.translation: Walid se osjećao smireno i tiho zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: Walid felt at ease and slept calmly.
